response.original_title: 383系 冬の臨時特急 しなの81号 名古屋～塩尻～松本～白馬
response.overview: The "Limited Express Shinano No. 81" is a special train that, unlike the regular "Limited Express Shinano" which connects Nagoya Station and Nagano Station, enters the Oito Line from Matsumoto Station and heads for Hakuba Station. This documentary captures the train, nicknamed "Hakuba Shinano," just before its final run, which disappeared from the timetable on February 11, 2025.
response.title: 383 Series Winter Special Limited Express Shinano No. 81 Nagoya - Shiojiri - Matsumoto - Hakuba
